name: Riso Kagaku Corporation
summary: Riso Kagaku Corporation provides products and services in the paper communication field in Japan and internationally. The company offers full color inkjet printers and consumables, digital duplicators and consumables, and digital screen makers and consumables under the ComColor, GOCCOPRO, and RISOGRAPH names, as well as technical training services. It offers its products to educational institutions, government and public agencies, companies, and stores. Riso Kagaku Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
